title: Kitale、Trans Nzoia — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Kitale、Trans Nzoia的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Kitale是Trans Nzoia的一个城市，人口约220,000。An agricultural town in western Kenya, known for its flower farms, maize production, and nearby national parks.
